titleStmt.title: SII 27.34: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 34. (A.R. No. 410 of 1938-39.) PUSHPAGIRI, (HAMLET OF KŌṬLŪRU), CUDDAPAH TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near Trikūṭēśvara shrine in the compound of Vaidyanāthasvāmin temple.

This mutilated record registers the gift of a village (name lost) to god Vaidyanāthadēva at Pushpagiri which is near the southern entrance of Śrīparvvata by mahāpradhāna Lakshmīdēva-daṇḍanāyaka, an officer under Siṁghaṇadēva. It also provides for feeding the pilgrims in a sattra of the maṭha named as Lakshmīnilaya after the donor for his long life and prosperity. Some other details are lost.
The record is published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XXX pp. 32 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta
praśakti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ samasta sē
nādhipati Anēkadēśādhipati sakaḷa lakṣmīpati bahatta
ra niyōgādhipati giradurggamalla paścimarāya
bhōjadēvadisāpaṭṭa śrīmatu pratāpa cakravartti
siṁgaṇadēva dakṣiṇa bhujādaṁḍa nāyaka nārāya
ṇa lakṣmīdēva daṁḍanāyakaru śrīparvvatada dakṣiṇa dvāra
pradēśadalli śrīgiripādaparvvatavappa śrī puḻpagiriya
pañcanadī saṁgamada paścimataṭa pradēśadalli śrī vaiōriginally the letters taṭa were engraved here which were, erased and da and pa written instead.
dyanātha dēvargge Aṁgabhōgaraṁga bhōgārtthaṁgaḷāgi
ḷūraṁ dēvarggekoṭṭu Āvāri satravanaḍasuvantāgi
lakṣmīniḻayaveṁddu tannahesaralu maṭhaṁ
māḍisi tanna Āyurārōgyaiśvaryya
trisaṁdhyeyoḷuṁ parasu
vaśaiva mahābhō
śrī lakṣmīdēva The
Digital edition of SII 27.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
